name: Daily Focus Recommender
description: Manually trigger the daily focus recommender. Analyzes all customers' current status, scores priorities, checks your calendar, and generates a focused action plan for the day with TAM goal mapping.

then.prompt: Run the Daily Focus Recommender SOP. Read the SOP from sops/daily-focus-recommender.md. Scan all customer folders in customers/ for context, check my calendar and emails for today, score each customer's urgency, and generate today's prioritized focus plan with time allocation recommendations and TAM goal mapping.
